# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building the project..."
  only:
    - merge_requests
  after_script:
    - |
      if [ "$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE" == "merge_request_event" ]; then
        MR_TITLE=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B | head -n 1)
        COMMIT_MESSAGE=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B)
        echo "Commit Message: $COMMIT_MESSAGE"
        echo "Merge Request Title: $MR_TITLE"
        # Add your deployment logic here
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/

release_job:
  stage: release
  script:
    - echo "Generating release notes..."
  only:
    - tags
  when: manual
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  script:
    - |
      if [ "$CI_COMMIT_TAG" ]; then
        echo "Release Notes for $CI_COMMIT_TAG:"
        # Add logic to generate release notes here, using MR titles and descriptions
      fi
